title: AWS teams working around the clock to keep Middle East services up after drone strikes, CEO says
summary_full: The Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region, and the company is working around the clock on availability, cloud chief Matt Garman said.
summary_public: The Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region, and the company is working around the clock on availability, cloud chief Matt Garman said.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war has hit Amazon data centers in the region
